targets.queryText:
SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(finished_at))) * 24 * 60, 1) AS value
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND finished_at IS NOT NULL;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(MAX(finished_at))) * 24 * 60, 1) AS value
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND finished_at IS NOT NULL;

targets.queryText:
SELECT battery_level AS value
FROM battery_samples
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText:
SELECT finished_at AS last_successful_sync_utc, source, sync_id
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT finished_at AS last_successful_sync_utc, source, sync_id
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText:
SELECT date(timestamp) || 'T00:00:00+00:00' AS time, COUNT(*) AS value
FROM heart_rates
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-29 days')
GROUP BY date(timestamp)
ORDER BY date(timestamp);

GROUP BY date(timestamp)
ORDER BY date(timestamp);

FROM blood_oxygen_samples

targets.queryText:
SELECT metric, latest_timestamp AS latest_timestamp_utc,
       ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(latest_timestamp)) * 24 * 60, 1) AS minutes_old
FROM (
    SELECT 'heart_rate' AS metric, MAX(timestamp) AS latest_timestamp FROM heart_rates WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'activity', MAX(timestamp) FROM sport_details WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'sleep', MAX(end_timestamp) FROM sleep_sessions WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'blood_oxygen', MAX(timestamp) FROM blood_oxygen_samples WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'pressure', MAX(timestamp) FROM pressure_samples WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'hrv', MAX(timestamp) FROM hrv_samples WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
)
ORDER BY metric;

    SELECT 'hrv', MAX(timestamp) FROM hrv_samples WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
)
ORDER BY metric;

targets.queryText:
SELECT sync_id, timestamp AS started_at_utc, finished_at AS finished_at_utc, source
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 25;
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT sync_id, timestamp AS started_at_utc, finished_at AS finished_at_utc, source
FROM syncs
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 25;

targets.queryText:
SELECT timestamp AS time, battery_level AS value
FROM battery_samples
WHERE device_id = COALESCE((SELECT device_id FROM devices WHERE CAST(device_id AS TEXT) = '${device}' OR nickname = '${device}' OR address = '${device}' OR name = '${device}' ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1), (SELECT device_id FROM devices ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_seen_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, last_seen_at DESC, device_id ASC LIMIT 1))
  AND timestamp >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00+00:00', 'now', '-29 days')
ORDER BY timestamp;
